intro: Turn it up, save the rhythm.
description:
Joy City is a vibrant city protected by the Harmony Keepers, a K pop inspired team who battle the Dark Echoes, creatures that spread apathy and steal harmony. When a powerful Echo attacks the Core of Creativity, the team learns that only perfect unity and synchronization can save the city and bring its rhythm back.
An interactive storybook experience. A linear narrative adventure perfect for young readers to enjoy a captivating story at their own pace.
